title: About
subtitle: Depuis 2008
description: Bord Cadre Films is an independent Swiss production company specializing in the development, financing, and production of international feature films. Its editorial line is distinguished by its strong cultural diversity and social awareness, drawing on collaborations with emerging and internationally renowned directors who champion visionary, pioneering, and daring cinema. Since its creation in 2004, Bord Cadre Films has positioned itself as a key partner on the global artistic scene. It maintains a regular presence at prestigious festivals such as Cannes, Venice, and Berlin, and its track record includes titles such as Triangle of Sadness (Ruben Ostlund), Memoria (Apichatpong Weerasethakul), Girls of the Sun (Eva Husson), Do Not Expect Too Much from the End of the World (Radu Jude) and Rimini (Ulrich Seidl).
